examples.title: Algorithm: Brightness Adjustment
examples.description: Adjusts the brightness of an image by adding a constant value to each pixel
examples.code:
ALGORITHM BrightnessAdjustment
INPUT: image, brightnessValue
OUTPUT: adjustedImage

BEGIN
  FOR EACH pixel IN image
    adjustedPixel = pixel + brightnessValue
    IF adjustedPixel > 255 THEN
      adjustedPixel = 255
    ELSE IF adjustedPixel < 0 THEN
      adjustedPixel = 0
    END IF
    ADD adjustedPixel TO adjustedImage
  END FOR
  RETURN adjustedImage
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm iterates over each pixel in the input image, adds the specified brightness value, and ensures the result is within the valid range of 0 to 255.

examples.title: Python: Contrast Adjustment
examples.description: Adjusts the contrast of an image by multiplying each pixel by a specified factor
examples.explanation: This function takes an image and a contrast factor as input, multiplies each pixel by the contrast factor, and returns the adjusted image.

examples.title: C: Inversion
examples.description: Inverts an image by subtracting each pixel value from 255
examples.explanation: This function takes an image and its size as input, and inverts the image by subtracting each pixel value from 255.
